nodes.content:
# Everything Claude Code

This map summarizes repository structure and important exploration paths. Start with subsystem nodes and follow evidence-backed links to inspect source files.

## Domain Clusters
- Explore [[docs-zh-cn]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[docs-ja-jp]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[docs-ko-kr]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[docs-zh-tw]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[agents-skills]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[cursor-rules]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[opencode-commands]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[scripts-hooks]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[assets-images]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[cursor-hooks]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[scripts-lib]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[opencode-prompts]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[skills-videodb]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[skills-continuous-learning-v2]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[rules-common]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[tests-lib]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.

## Explorations Needed
- Which subsystems should be prioritized for onboarding documentation?
- Which dependencies are high-risk and need version guardrails?
- Where should integration tests be expanded based on current topology?
